subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-13 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: They [the apostles] gathered on top of a mountain, and made a pact whereby they would consent to bear tribulations
subcodes.first_line_orig: یک اجتماعی در بالای کُوه نمودند و در قبول بلایا و ترک راحت و نشر هدایت همعهد شدند
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @devotion; sacrifice; consecration in teaching the Cause
